name: Discarded Dimensional Gauntlet
descs: When dealing damage against enemies with Skills that consume [Charge] Count or <noparse>Unique Charge</noparse>, +0.1 to the lowest Attack Type Resist. for the turn (once per turn)

When dealing damage against enemies with Skills that consume [Charge] Count or <noparse>Unique Charge</noparse>, +0.1 to the lowest Attack Type Resist. for the turn (once per turn)
- Also, inflict 1 [VioletResistDown]

When dealing damage against enemies with Skills that consume [Charge] Count or <noparse>Unique Charge</noparse>, +0.1 to the lowest Attack Type Resist. for the turn (2 times per turn)
- Also, inflict 1 [VioletResistDown] and 1 [AzureResistDown]
